creator: ahze@ahze.net
text:
diff -ruN p5-LJ-TextMessage.bak/Makefile p5-LJ-TextMessage/Makefile
--- p5-LJ-TextMessage.bak/Makefile	Wed Jun 27 13:04:33 2001
+++ p5-LJ-TextMessage/Makefile	Wed Jun 27 13:04:41 2001
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/sysutils/p5-LJ-TextMessage/Makefile,v 1.3 2001/05/11 16:34:25 vanilla Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	LJ-TextMessage
-PORTVERSION=	1.4
+PORTVERSION=	1.4.1
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	http://livejournal.com/files/code/textmessage/ \
 		ftp://ftp.livejournal.com/code/textmessage/
diff -ruN p5-LJ-TextMessage.bak/distinfo p5-LJ-TextMessage/distinfo
--- p5-LJ-TextMessage.bak/distinfo	Wed Jun 27 13:04:33 2001
+++ p5-LJ-TextMessage/distinfo	Wed Jun 27 13:04:48 2001
@@ -1 +1 @@
-MD5 (LJ-TextMessage-1.4.tar.gz) = 3ee9270a7f86d149f3f0006950207f16
+MD5 (LJ-TextMessage-1.4.1.tar.gz) = 6c4ba56b009f753712e62bd8dba1f360
